summary: Deliverable has critical structural issues: (1) pr-label-assigner.ts imports unused `minimize` from bun:utils (dead code); (2) workflow references `bun test` and `bun install` but no package.json provided, will fail immediately; (3) test-workflow.ts is never invoked by workflow despite being a separate test harness—doesn't meet requirement that 'tests execute via act'; (4) duplicate label-assignment logic in workflow lines 46-53 vs 55-64; (5) weak validation in test-workflow.ts: relies on string matching 'Job succeeded' rather than parsing actual label output; (6) workflow doesn't call GitHub API to assign labels to PRs—just runs script and prints output; (7) hardcoded test files in workflow line 58. Workflow won't execute; test harness incomplete and disconnected.
